name: Vendor Performance
description: Maintenance coordinates vendor scorecards, incident review, probation/offboarding drafts, and roster recommendations with human approval before any vendor, owner, resident, dispatch-pool, money, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize Vendor Performance
stages.description: Normalize vendor metrics, incidents, and missing scorecard facts.

steps.title: Normalize vendor performance
steps.instructions: Normalize vendor, trade, service area, completed jobs, callbacks, resident complaints, owner complaints, response time, pricing flags, invoice disputes, COI/license state, incident refs, and missing facts. Unknown quality, liability, removal basis, or money impact must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize vendor performance facts and missing-data flags. No vendor notices, roster changes, money action, or system writes.

steps.title: Check vendor ownership and context
steps.instructions: Check whether a human already owns the vendor issue, active jobs that could be disrupted, open invoices, owner escalations, resident impacts, and prior probation/offboarding history. Do not contact vendor or change dispatch eligibility.
steps.dispatch_body: Check vendor ownership, active work, invoice, and escalation context. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Draft Scorecard Packet
stages.description: Prepare scorecard and recommendation drafts without changing vendor status.

steps.title: Draft vendor scorecard
steps.instructions: Draft scorecard with evidence-backed performance metrics, open concerns, invoice caveats, active-job risks, probation recommendation, offboarding recommendation if supported, and vendor/owner/resident communication drafts. Draft-only; do not notify anyone or change eligibility.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft vendor scorecard and recommendation packet only. No external sends, roster changes, money action, or system writes.

steps.title: Review vendor scorecard
steps.instructions: Review scorecard evidence, active-work impact, invoice/payment issues, vendor fairness, owner/resident communication, and dispatch continuity before approval.
steps.human_prompt: Review vendor scorecard before vendor, owner, resident, roster, money, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Vendor Action
stages.description: Human approval gates vendor notices, roster changes, and offboarding.

steps.title: Approve vendor performance action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or assign before any vendor notice, probation, offboarding, dispatch-pool change, owner update, resident update, invoice/payment action, contract action, PropertyMeld change, or AppFolio write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before vendor performance notice, roster, owner, resident, money, contract, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved vendor performance package
steps.instructions: Stage approved scorecard, vendor/owner/resident drafts, roster-change metadata, invoice caveats, active-job transition notes, approval source, and unresolved needs_verification fields for human release. Do not send, offboard, change eligibility, pay, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved vendor performance package for human release. No external sends, roster changes, money action, or system writes.
